whoWeAre.subtitle: WHO WE ARE
whoWeAre.title: Designing homes to help people live better.
whoWeAre.p1: At K3 Home Style, we believe an organized home is more than just beautiful. It creates peace of mind, improves productivity, and enhances everyday living for every member of the family.
whoWeAre.p2: Every project is thoughtfully designed around each client's lifestyle, creating functional, elegant, and lasting organizational solutions.

services.desc: Every home is unique. We create customized organization solutions that bring functionality, beauty, and peace of mind to every space in your home.

s0.title: Home Staging
s0.desc: We professionally prepare your home for the market by creating clean, organized, and visually appealing spaces that attract more buyers, generate stronger interest, and help your property stand out from the competition.

s1.title: Home Organization
s1.desc: Create functional, organized, and peaceful living spaces designed around your family's lifestyle and daily routines.

s2.title: Closet Organization
s2.desc: Maximize your closet space with customized systems that simplify your daily routine while keeping everything beautifully organized.

s3.title: Kitchen & Pantry
s3.desc: Transform your kitchen and pantry into organized, efficient spaces that make cooking, storage, and everyday living easier.

s4.title: Playroom Organization
s4.desc: Create practical and inviting play areas where toys, books, and activities stay organized while remaining fun and functional for children.

s5.title: Garage Organization
s5.desc: Turn your garage into a clean, organized, and functional space with smart storage solutions for tools, seasonal items, and everyday essentials.

gallery.desc: Every project is tailored to create calm, functional and beautifully organized environments that reflect each client's lifestyle.

i0.title: Closet Organization
i0.desc: Smart storage solutions that maximize every inch with style, organization, and easy access to your clothing and accessories.

i1.title: Kitchen Organization
i1.desc: Modern, functional kitchens designed for efficient storage, everyday convenience, and timeless style.

i2.title: Elegant Living Room
i2.desc: Comfortable living spaces with smart storage solutions that keep everything organized while enhancing your home's style.

i3.title: Luxury Pantry
i3.desc: Well-organized pantry solutions that maximize storage and make everyday essentials easy to access.

i4.title: Minimal Bedroom
i4.desc: Personalized bedroom solutions that combine comfort, organization, and a peaceful atmosphere.

i5.title: Home Office
i5.desc: Functional office spaces designed to boost productivity with organized, comfortable, and stylish layouts.

i6.title: Modern Bathroom
i6.desc: Practical bathroom storage solutions that maximize space while maintaining a clean and modern look.

baskets.title: Custom Storage Baskets by K3 Home Styles
baskets.desc: Every organized space deserves beautiful storage. Our handcrafted baskets are customized with premium fabrics, leather labels, wood accents, and personalized details to perfectly match your home and style.

s1.title: Signature K3 Collection
s1.desc: Designed for every space in your home. Removable and washable linings, K3Homestyles leather labels, natural and durable materials.

s2.title: Jute Rope Collection
s2.desc: Details that transform your home. Natural style organization for spaces that inspire well-being.

s3.title: Serenity Collection
s3.desc: Perfect for bathrooms. Keep your towels and essentials beautifully organized with our moisture-resistant woven designs.

s4.title: Modern Pantry Collection
s4.desc: Elevate your kitchen storage. Ideal for organizing dry goods, snacks, and cooking essentials in style.

s5.title: Little Dream Collection
s5.desc: Charming storage for kids' rooms and nurseries. Perfect for toys, blankets, and keeping playtime clutter-free.

process.desc: A personalized experience designed to create functional, beautiful, and stress-free spaces.

s0.title: Free Consultation
s0.desc: We get to know your space, lifestyle, goals, budget, and organization challenges.

s1.title: Personalized Plan
s1.desc: We design a customized organization plan and recommend storage solutions and products that fit your home and style.

s2.title: Transformation Day
s2.desc: We declutter, organize, style, label, and optimize every space with attention to every detail.

s3.title: Final Walkthrough
s3.desc: Together we review every area, make final adjustments, and ensure you're completely satisfied.

s4.title: K3 Signature Finish
s4.desc: We add the finishing touches with beautifully styled baskets, labels, and personalized details that make your home both functional and elegant.

s5.title: Maintenance & Support
s5.desc: You'll receive simple organization tips and ongoing support to help keep your home organized long after the project is complete.

testimonials.desc: Our greatest satisfaction comes from helping families create organized, functional and beautiful homes they truly enjoy.

t0.name: Sarah Johnson
t0.text: K3 Home Style completely transformed my home. Every room feels more functional, elegant and organized than I ever imagined.

t1.name: Emily Carter
t1.text: The attention to detail was incredible. The entire process was smooth, professional and exceeded all my expectations.

t2.name: Michael Brown
t2.text: I never thought organization could completely change the way we live. Our home feels bigger, calmer and much easier to maintain.

contact.desc: Ready to transform your home into a functional, organized and beautiful space? We'd love to hear about your project and help bring your vision to life.
